languages.text: "Скорее, сюда! Пока кошмары не сбежались на шум!"

traits.locale_text: "Скорее, сюда! Пока кошмары не сбежались на шум!"
"Скорее, сюда! Пока кошмары не сбежались на шум!"

languages.text: "Over here, quick! Before the Nightmares come to investigate the noise!"
languages.original_text: "Скорее, сюда! Пока кошмары не сбежались на шум!"

"Over here, quick! Before the Nightmares come to investigate the noise!"

languages.text: "Hierher, schnell! Bevor die Nightmares kommen, um den Lärm zu untersuchen!"
languages.original_text: "Over here, quick! Before the Nightmares come to investigate the noise!"

languages.text: "Par ici, vite ! Avant que les Cauchemars ne viennent enquêter sur le bruit !"
languages.original_text: "Over here, quick! Before the Nightmares come to investigate the noise!"

languages.text: "快过来趁着'噩梦'还没来调查这声音！"
languages.original_text: "Over here, quick! Before the Nightmares come to investigate the noise!"

languages.text: "¡Por aquí, rápido! ¡Antes de que las Pesadillas vengan a investigar el ruido!"
languages.original_text: "Over here, quick! Before the Nightmares come to investigate the noise!"

languages.text: "こっちだ、急げ！ナイトメアが騒音調査に来る前に！"
languages.original_text: "Over here, quick! Before the Nightmares come to investigate the noise!"

languages.text: "Buraya, çabuk! Kabuslar gürültüyü araştırmaya gelmeden önce!"
languages.original_text: "Over here, quick! Before the Nightmares come to investigate the noise!"
